steps: Contact RBC Investor Services to dispute the 13.5% withholding tax rate applied to BMO dividend (ISIN CA0679011084)
Provide documentation proving CLIENT05's Norwegian tax residency to support CA-NO treaty 15% rate claim
Request refund of CAD 4,077.00 overpayment due to incorrect tax rate application
Submit formal reclaim with RBC referencing Canada-Norway tax treaty Article 10 dividend provisions
